title: Our Team
description: Meet the Virtual Auditor team: Chartered Accountants, Company Secretaries, Registered Valuers, and support professionals across Chennai, Bangalore,
bodyText:
Virtual Auditor is led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV) and supported by a team of qualified Chartered Accountants, Company Secretaries, and articled professionals across Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. The team combines deep regulatory knowledge with technology-first delivery. Quick Answer: Our Team — Meet the Virtual Auditor team: Chartered Accountants, Company Secretaries, Registered Valuers, and support professionals across Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai.
Our Team is a service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), specialising in professional CA and CS services, from offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai since 2012.
Official References: MCA Filing Portal ↗ · SPICe+ Form ↗
HEADING2: Leadership

CA V. Viswanathan — Founder & IBBI Registered Valuer. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333. 14+ years of practice. 100+ valuations delivered. Based: Chennai.

HEADING2: Practice Teams
Valuation Team (Chennai) FEMA & Cross-Border (Chennai/Mumbai) GST & Indirect Tax (All Offices) Income Tax & Appeals (Chennai) Forensic & Investigation (Chennai) Company Secretarial (Bangalore) Registration & Compliance (All Offices) Startup Advisory (Bangalore/Chennai)
HEADING2: People Also Ask

HEADING3: What makes Virtual Auditor different?

Four credentials in one firm: FCA (financial expertise) + ACS (corporate governance) + CFE (forensic rigour) + IBBI RV (statutory valuation authority). 14+ years of multi-regulatory practice. 100+ IBBI-compliant valuations. This combination is rare in India.

HEADING3: Is the initial consultation free?

Yes. Free 30-minute consultation. Call +91 99622 60333 (Chennai), +91 95139 39333 (Bangalore), +91 77000 89597 (Mumbai), or email support@virtualauditor.in.

HEADING3: Need Help With This?

Free 30-minute consultation with CA V. Viswanathan, FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. No obligation.

Virtual Auditor conducts audits in compliance with the Standards on Auditing (SAs) issued by ICAI and applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013. Our audit methodology combines risk-based assessment with substantive testing to provide reasonable assurance on financial statements.

The audit process includes: engagement planning and risk assessment, understanding internal controls, substantive audit procedures, analytical review, management representation, and audit report issuance. We use technology-enabled audit tools for data analytics, sampling, and documentation.

Our team is led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE) with experience across manufacturing, technology, financial services, healthcare, and real estate sectors. We serve clients in Chennai, Bangalore, Mumbai, and across India.

faqs.q: Who leads the Virtual Auditor team?
faqs.a: CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV) — founder and lead practitioner. 14+ years of experience. Personally handles valuations, complex appeals, and forensic engagements.

faqs.q: How many professionals does Virtual Auditor have?
faqs.a: Team of CA, CS, and support professionals across three offices. Specialised teams for valuation, compliance, tax, and forensic work. Senior professionals assigned to every engagement.

faqs.q: Do you have specialists for each service?
faqs.a: Yes. Dedicated teams for: valuations (IBBI RV led), GST/IT appeals (CA led), FEMA compliance (CA + CS), company registration/compliance (CS led), forensic accounting (CFE led), and startup advisory.

faqs.q: Can I work with the founder directly?
faqs.a: Yes. All valuation reports are signed by CA V. Viswanathan personally. Complex appeals and forensic engagements are founder-led. Registration and routine compliance handled by team under founder supervision.
No. All work done in-house by our team. No outsourcing to junior freelancers. This is a key differentiator from aggregator platforms like ClearTax and IndiaFilings that route work externally.
